name: discogs-artist-releases-on-youtube
description: Chrome extension: browse a Discogs artist's releases on YouTube. (package.json is for dev tooling only; the extension itself loads from manifest.json.)

scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.js && node scripts/changelog.js && git add manifest.json CHANGELOG.md
scripts.release: npm version ${BUMP:-$(node scripts/recommend-bump.js)} -m "chore(release): %s" && npm run build
scripts.postrelease: echo 'Built dist/eingang-<version>.zip — upload it at the Chrome Web Store dashboard, then: git push --follow-tags'
